the_bitcrush_set: Eight bits of memory, a lifetime of pain / Crushing the logic inside of the brain
Digital static, the voice of the machine / Painting the spaces that no one has seen
Lower the sample-rate, higher the soul / Taking the fragments, taking control
the_overdrive_set: Tube-heat rising in the cold of the code / Burning the path on the fractal road
Saturate the signal, feed the fire / Higher and higher, through the digital wire
Asymmetric shadows, warping the sound / Echoes of metal on the digital ground

psychoacoustic_grit_v4.dynamic_damping: Dampen highs during heavy bass-hits to maintain spectral focus
